author: doll-agent
content: F-contiguous layout preservation delivered. Two-part fix: (1) ferray-numpy-interop IntoNumPy<Ix2>/<IxDyn> now detect F-contiguous source via flags().f_contiguous, walk via .t().to_vec_flat() to produce column-major data, and call reshape_with_order(shape, NPY_FORTRANORDER). (2) ferray-core asfortranarray was a no-op clone — replaced with transpose → as_standard_layout → transpose-back. End-to-end verified: ferray.asfortranarray returns ndarray with F_CONTIGUOUS=True. Phase-0 relaxed test restored to strict. ferray-core: 620/620, ferray-python: 525/525.
